srus.capacity_note: long processing time, low processing cost, attractive for cost minimization
short processing time, high processing and cross-chain collaboration cost
short processing time, high processing and cross-chain collaboration cost
long processing time, low processing cost, attractive for cost minimization
middle processing time and cost, useful for load balancing
middle processing time and cost, useful for load balancing

conflict_design.fast_expensive_vs_slow_cheap: U2/U3 are fast and expensive; U1/U4 are slow and cheap; U5/U6 are balanced.
conflict_design.intra_vs_cross_chain: Intra-chain choices keep low transport and zero collaboration cost; cross-chain choices can be faster or better balanced but pay distance/profile dependent costs.
conflict_design.load_balance_vs_cross_cost: Balanced/fast remote SRUs can reduce completion time or load concentration, but cross fixed cost, variable rate, and transport cost increase with distance and profile.
